steps.prompt: Analyze today's sessions across all projects for behavioral anti-patterns: sycophancy, over-engineering, build-then-undo, token waste, search flooding. Use extract_transcript.py to preprocess, then dispatch to Gemini for analysis. Append structured findings to improvement-log.md. RECURRENCE GATE: Only draft CLAUDE.md or hook changes if a finding recurs in 2+ sessions -- check existing improvement-log entries before proposing.
